title: /usr/bin/podman version returning Error: could not get runtime: eventer creation: No support for journald logging
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
On creating podman rpm from libpod master branch using make package-install command then running */usr/bin/podman version* command retruns this error.
Error: could not get runtime: eventer creation: No support for journald logging
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. git clone https://github.com/containers/libpod

2. cd libpod, make package-install

**Describe the results you received:**
Installed:
  podman-remote-99:1.8.3-1585651169.git9c7410d3.fc31.x86_64                                                                                                                 

Complete!
/usr/bin/podman version
Error: could not get runtime: eventer creation: No support for journald logging
make: *** [Makefile:662: package-install] Error 125

**Describe the results you expected:**
It should return podman version

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
[raukadah@ironman libpod]$ /usr/bin/podman version
Error: could not get runtime: eventer creation: No support for journald logging
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
[raukadah@ironman libpod]$ /usr/bin/podman info --debug
Error: could not get runtime: eventer creation: No support for journald logging

```



**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
It is currently failing on rdo software factory CI with the same error.

comments.body:
> u need to install systemd-devel

I wonder if something has changed. Didn't we default to a non-systemd backend for events before?

@baude systemd-devel is installed on the system.
```
[raukadah@ironman libpod]$ rpm -qa | grep systemd-devel
systemd-devel-243.7-1.fc31.x86_64
```
was it installed when you built it? also, the spec in the contrib might not have support for systemd-devel yet

During build time, it was not getting installed. https://logserver.rdoproject.org/78/5678/f7dda3889cc05d05e387791252254a20c80b5a48/github-check/podman-package-centos-7/5acfea1/job-output.txt
```
 Podman is being compiled without the systemd build tag. Install libsystemd on 	Ubuntu or systemd-devel on rpm based distro for journald support. 
```
Message was coming. Right now after applying https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/5683 this patch, it vanishes, I think we can close this issue.
